title: phaseolus vulgaris var. citrinus
intro: Phaseolus vulgaris var. citrinus, also known as the yellow bush bean, is a variety of the common bean plant that is widely cultivated for its edible seeds and pods. The medicinal properties of Phaseolus vulgaris var. citrinus include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health due to its high levels of antioxidants and fiber. The health benefits of consuming this plant include lowering cholesterol levels, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Phaseolus vulgaris var. citrinus can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions to utilize its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health.
